title: orthosiphon stamineus
intro: Orthosiphon stamineus, also known as Miswak or Java tea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The health benefits of Orthosiphon stamineus include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antioxidant. This plant can be prepared in various forms, including tea, capsules, and extracts, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
